RemediationStrings.Title: RunAsPPL (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RunAsPPL must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: LimitBlankPasswordUse (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\LimitBlankPasswordUse must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictAnonymousSAM (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictAnonymousSAM must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictAnonymous (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictAnonymous must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: SCENoApplyLegacyAuditPolicy (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\SCENoApplyLegacyAuditPolicy must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: NTLMMinClientSec (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0\NTLMMinClientSec must be 537395200. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: LmCompatibilityLevel (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\LmCompatibilityLevel must be 5. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: allownullsessionfallback (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0\allownullsessionfallback must be 0. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: NTLMMinServerSec (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\MSV1_0\NTLMMinServerSec must be 537395200. Severity: Critical. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: requirestrongkey (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters\requirestrongkey must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: sealsecurechannel (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters\sealsecurechannel must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: requiresignorseal (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters\requiresignorseal must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: signsecurechannel (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters\signsecurechannel must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: LDAPClientIntegrity (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\LDAP\LDAPClientIntegrity must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictRemoteSAM (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictRemoteSAM must be O:BAG:BAD:(A;;RC;;;BA). Severity: Medium. Category: Local Security Authority.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisablePasswordChange (Local Security Authority)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netlogon\Parameters\DisablePasswordChange must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Local Security Authority.
